summary: Retested the payment fallback regression and related UI/API flows. Paid seeded sessions now remain paid through /api/payments/status fallback, paid downloads stay available before/after polling, unpaid sessions still do not expose downloads, and core analytics/admin/blog/testimonials/product file manager smoke checks pass.
action_items: Optional: keep /checkout/success unpaid-state UX under observation; short waits can still show interim 'Checking payment status...' while polling is in progress.
critical_code_review_comments: Fallback in /api/payments/status now correctly preserves prior paid/processed state and prevents destructive paid->unpaid downgrade on provider lookup errors.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary paid checkout sessions + product files for regression verification; all created seed data cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 validated the originally reported regression end-to-end. New targeted pytest regression file covers paid fallback preservation, pre/post status download availability, unpaid gating, and smoke checks. Full backend suite result: 27 passed.
rca of the issue: Previously, provider lookup fallback in /api/payments/status could overwrite already-paid records to unpaid/open. Retest confirms patched fallback now preserves paid/processed state and returns paid/complete for already-paid transactions when provider lookup fails.
